overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character exploring a rainy plantation courtyard with a central fountain, passing through an archway and narrow service passage, then exiting past a horse-drawn carriage onto a rural dirt road surrounded by willow trees and marshland.

scene_state.functional_zone: manor house courtyard garden with central fountain and white pergola

agents.ego_description: walking through the rainy courtyard garden, circling past a three-tiered fountain and white pergola

entered.detail: stone fountain with three tiers in a rectangular pond
white wooden pergola structure with lattice sides
white painted lattice fence lining the garden
large two-story historic house with shuttered windows and wrought iron balcony
ornate exterior staircase attached to the house
white metal tables and chairs under the pergola

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a rainy courtyard garden of a historic manor. A three-tiered fountain sits in a rectangular pond to the right, while a white pergola with garden furniture stands ahead. The manor house looms on the left with its ornate ironwork and shuttered windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between main house and outbuildings with vine-covered archway

events.description: character passes through white vine-covered archway into narrow passage between buildings

agents.ego_description: approaching the manor house and passing through a white archway into a narrower service passage

entered.detail: white wooden archway covered in vines with lettering on top
small building with blue double doors

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the side of the manor house, passing through a white vine-covered archway into a narrow passage. The fountain and pergola disappear from view as the carriage house comes into sight ahead on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service passage between estate buildings leading to exit

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow brick path between the main house and outbuildings toward the estate exit

entered.detail: tall brick pillars marking the estate exit

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the narrow passage, the carriage house draws closer on the right while brick gateposts marking the estate exit become visible ahead. The white archway falls behind as the character approaches the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: estate exit with horse-drawn carriage and transition to open countryside

events.description: character exits through brick gateposts into open rural landscape

agents.ego_description: passing a stationary horse-drawn carriage and exiting the estate through brick gateposts into the open countryside

notable_agents.action: team of four horses harnessed to a stationary carriage

entered.detail: large wooden carriage with red upholstery and white horses
metal truss bridge spanning a waterway in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character passes a stationary horse-drawn carriage with four harnessed horses on the right, then exits through the brick gateposts. The estate buildings fall away as the open countryside with a distant metal bridge comes into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt road through marshy woodland with willow trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the muddy rural road surrounded by willow trees and open marshland

entered.detail: weeping willow trees lining both sides of the road
small wooden building in the distance

segments.scene_description: Now on an open dirt road, the character walks through a landscape of weeping willow trees and marshy grassland. The metal truss bridge remains visible to the left while a small wooden shack appears in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed, rainy courtyard of a historic manor out into an expansive, marshy rural landscape. It begins by moving past a three-tiered fountain and a white pergola within the manor's garden, before turning toward the side of the house to pass through a vine-covered archway. As the character enters a narrow service passage, the garden disappears from view and the scene shifts toward a carriage house and brick gateposts marking the estate's edge. The camera then passes a stationary horse-drawn carriage and exits through the gates, causing the estate buildings to fall away as the horizon opens up to reveal a distant metal bridge. Finally, the movement continues onto a dirt road, transitioning into a wide vista of weeping willow trees and marshy grassland with a small wooden shack appearing in the distance.
